module.name: barchart
module.description: Simple horizontal bar chart from label:value pairs (pure CSS). For comparing a handful of values without a full chart library.
module.aiSpec:
A lightweight horizontal BAR CHART for comparing values (survey results, scores, shares). Block module: split the body with `<!-- @ -->`, one bar per section, each written `Label: value` (or `Label | value`). Bars auto-scale to the largest value unless you set `max`. Use @chartjs for full-featured charts and @histogram for a frequency distribution; this is for a quick, on-theme comparison of a few bars.
Body: one `Label: value` (or `Label | value`) per `<!-- @ -->` section. Value may be negative or decimal.
Parameters: - max (number, default 0 = auto): fixes the 100% scale end; 0/blank auto-scales to the largest absolute value. - unit (text, default empty): suffix appended to each printed value, e.g. % or ms. - color (color, default var(--accent-color)): bar (and value-text) color. - showvalues (boolean, default true): show the numeric value at the end of each row. - sort (select: none | desc | asc, default none): none keeps written order; desc/asc sort by value. - barheight (number em, default 1.4): thickness of each bar track (0.6–4). - radius (number px, default 5): bar/track corner radius (0–40).
Usage: <!-- @barchart unit: %, sort: desc, showvalues: true --> Chrome: 65 <!-- @ --> Safari: 19 <!-- @ --> Edge: 5 <!-- @end -->

param.name: unit
param.label: Value suffix
param.desc: Appended to each value, e.g. %, ms.

param.name: color
param.label: Bar color
param.desc: Fill color of the bars and value labels.

param.name: showvalues
param.label: Show values
param.desc: Show the numeric value at the end of each row.

param.name: sort
param.label: Sort
param.options: none:As written,desc:High to low,asc:Low to high

snippet.label: Bar chart
snippet.description: Horizontal bars from "Label: value" sections; auto-scaled.

snippet.label: Bar chart (sorted)
snippet.text: <!-- @barchart unit: %, sort: desc --> Chrome: 65 <!-- @ --> Safari: 19 <!-- @ --> Edge: 5 <!-- @end -->
